description: Cab ceiling or recessed light fixtures burned out, dim, or flickering, reducing visibility below safe levels
visual_signals: dark spots on ceiling where light fixture is not illuminating
flickering fluorescent tube or LED panel in cab ceiling
dim cab interior with insufficient ambient light for button reading

description: Emergency lighting unit missing, visibly damaged, or non-functional inside the cab
visual_signals: empty emergency light housing with no battery unit installed
broken lens cover on emergency lighting pack in cab
emergency light fixture with cracked casing or disconnected wiring

description: Cab wall panels showing scratches, dents, puncture holes, or delamination exposing substrate
visual_signals: deep scratch marks gouged into stainless steel cab wall panel
dented wall panel with visible impact depression
peeling laminate lifting away from cab wall substrate

description: Cab ceiling panels damaged, sagging, stained, or showing signs of water intrusion from the hoistway
visual_signals: brown water stain spreading across cab ceiling panel
ceiling tile sagging or displaced from grid in cab
drip marks or mineral deposits trailing down from ceiling

description: Cab handrail loose, detached from mounting brackets, or entirely missing from the cab wall
visual_signals: handrail pulled away from wall with visible gap at bracket
empty bolt holes on cab wall where handrail was mounted
handrail hanging by single bracket with other end detached

description: Cab flooring worn through, torn, curling at edges, or presenting a trip hazard at the threshold
visual_signals: curled floor edge at cab door threshold creating trip lip
torn vinyl or carpet exposing subfloor underneath
worn-through flooring with visible metal subfloor at high-traffic area

description: Cab mirror cracked, shattered, missing, or de-silvered to the point of being non-functional
visual_signals: spider-web crack pattern across cab wall mirror
empty mirror frame on rear wall with no glass installed
clouded mirror surface with de-silvered patches blocking reflection

description: Car operating panel damaged, buttons broken or missing, Braille markings illegible, or faceplate loose
visual_signals: floor button missing from car operating panel leaving empty hole
COP faceplate cracked or loose hanging away from wall
button stuck in depressed position not returning when pressed

description: Car door panel dented, scratched, corroded, or showing paint bubbling indicating hidden corrosion
visual_signals: visible dent in center or edge of car door panel
rust streaks or corrosion bubbling at bottom of door panel
deep gouge or scratch across door panel face

description: Car or hoistway doors misaligned, with asymmetric gaps at center parting or along the door edges
visual_signals: uneven gap between two closed door panels at center meet
one door panel sitting higher than the other at parting line
light visible through irregular gap along door edge and frame

description: Debris, dirt, or foreign objects lodged in the door track or landing sill groove preventing smooth door operation
visual_signals: visible debris packed into sill groove at door threshold
dirt and grime buildup in door track preventing panel travel
small objects or trash caught in landing sill slot

description: Door safety edge or electronic reopening sensor visibly damaged, detached, or missing from the leading door edge
visual_signals: rubber safety edge torn and hanging from door leading edge
infrared sensor strip detached or missing from door edge
exposed wiring where door edge safety device was mounted

description: Doors not fully closing, leaving a visible gap, preventing the door interlock from engaging properly
visual_signals: gap remaining between door panels that should be fully closed
door bouncing back before reaching fully closed position
door stuck partially open with cab visible from landing

description: Landing door panel dented, corroded, bowed outward, or showing damage that compromises fire rating
visual_signals: dent or impact damage on hallway-side elevator door panel
rust and corrosion on lower portion of landing door
landing door panel bowed outward or warped from frame

description: Floor position indicator at the landing not illuminated, displaying incorrectly, or completely non-functional
visual_signals: dark or blank floor indicator display above landing door
LED segments missing from floor number making it unreadable
hall lantern arrow not illuminating when car arrives

description: Hall call button at the landing cracked, broken, missing its faceplate, or not illuminating when pressed
visual_signals: cracked lens on hall call button at elevator landing
button faceplate missing exposing mechanism behind wall
hall call button not lighting up when pressed by user

description: Excessive gap between the landing sill and the car sill exceeding ASME A17.1 clearance limits, creating an entrapment hazard
visual_signals: wide visible gap between car floor edge and landing floor
sill plate misalignment creating gap larger than normal
gap at threshold wide enough for shoe or small object to fall through

description: Hallway lighting at the elevator landing inadequate, making it difficult to safely identify the car threshold
visual_signals: dim hallway area immediately in front of elevator doors
burned-out ceiling fixture near elevator landing entrance
shadowed threshold area making it hard to see floor transition

description: Standing water or evidence of flooding in the elevator pit indicating sump pump failure or water intrusion
visual_signals: water pooled on elevator pit floor around buffer bases
water line marks or mineral staining on pit walls
rust staining on pit equipment from chronic water exposure

description: Debris, trash, or contaminants accumulated in the elevator pit creating fire or vermin hazard
visual_signals: trash and debris scattered on elevator pit floor
oil-soaked rags or absorbent materials left in pit
construction debris or dust accumulation on pit equipment

description: Pit buffer springs or oil buffers showing visible damage, corrosion, leaking fluid, or misalignment
visual_signals: heavily corroded buffer spring with flaking rust
oil buffer with fluid leaking from cylinder onto pit floor
buffer plunger visibly misaligned or tilted off center

description: Pit lighting fixture missing, broken, or non-functional preventing safe pit inspection access
visual_signals: no light fixture illuminating elevator pit space
broken or shattered light bulb in pit fixture housing
empty light socket in pit with no bulb installed

description: Machine room fire extinguisher missing from its designated location, discharged, or showing an expired inspection tag
visual_signals: empty wall bracket where machine room extinguisher should hang
extinguisher with pressure gauge needle in red discharged zone
inspection tag on extinguisher showing date more than 12 months old

description: Oil leaks or hydraulic fluid spills on the machine room floor around the power unit or piping connections
visual_signals: oil puddle beneath hydraulic power unit on machine room floor
dark fluid stain trail along piping run on floor
oil-soaked absorbent pads or cat litter spread on machine room floor

description: Combustible materials, stored items, or debris present in the machine room violating dedicated-use requirements
visual_signals: cardboard boxes or non-elevator items stored in machine room
cleaning supplies or paint cans on shelves near controller
personal belongings or building supplies stacked against machine room wall

description: Frayed, spliced, or damaged electrical wiring visible in the machine room or controller cabinet
visual_signals: frayed wire with exposed copper strands in controller cabinet
electrical tape splice on wiring inside machine room panel
cracking wire insulation on cables running to motor or controller

description: Machine room ventilation grilles blocked, fan not operating, or ambient temperature excessively high
visual_signals: items stacked blocking ventilation grille or louver in machine room
exhaust fan blades stationary and not spinning
condensation forming on machine room walls indicating high temperature

description: Hoist ropes showing visible fraying, broken wires, flattening, or excessive wear beyond replacement criteria
visual_signals: broken wire strands protruding from hoist rope surface
flattened or kinked section of hoist rope indicating damage
visible wear groove worn into rope from sheave contact

description: Guide rails showing corrosion, excessive wear on running surfaces, or missing rail clips and brackets
visual_signals: rust and corrosion on guide rail running surface
worn groove or channel on rail face from guide shoe contact
missing rail clip or loose bracket bolt at rail joint

description: Weight capacity data plate missing, illegible, or not posted in a conspicuous location inside the cab
visual_signals: no capacity plate or label visible anywhere inside cab
faded capacity label with unreadable weight numbers
capacity sign partially obscured by damage or covering

description: Inspection certificate missing from its required display location, expired, or illegible
visual_signals: empty certificate frame or holder inside cab with no document
inspection certificate with expiration date clearly past due
water-damaged or faded certificate that cannot be read

description: Emergency alarm button or intercom not visible, damaged, or missing its identifying signage on the car operating panel
visual_signals: alarm bell button with worn-off icon on car operating panel
damaged intercom grille with broken cover on COP
no emergency alarm label or symbol visible on control panel

description: Emergency phone or two-way communication device non-functional, handset missing, or instructions not posted
visual_signals: phone handset missing from cradle in cab phone compartment
cut or severed phone cord hanging in cab
phone compartment door missing with no instructions posted

description: Escalator comb plate broken or missing teeth — comb fingers at escalator landing plate broken, missing, or damaged creating entrapment hazard
visual_signals: broken or missing teeth on escalator comb plate at landing
gap in comb finger row where teeth have snapped off
cracked comb plate with visible damage at step transition

description: Escalator handrail speed mismatch — handrail moving noticeably faster or slower than step movement creating loss-of-balance hazard
visual_signals: handrail visibly pulling ahead of step movement on escalator
passenger hand being dragged forward or lagging behind step
handrail rubber belt slipping or jerking at drive section

description: Escalator step demarcation missing — yellow safety demarcation lines absent or worn off on step edges reducing visibility of step boundaries
visual_signals: escalator steps without yellow demarcation lines on edges
faded or worn-away step edge markings on escalator
step cleats lacking contrasting color stripe at leading edge

description: Escalator emergency stop button missing, obstructed, or not clearly marked at upper and lower landings
visual_signals: escalator landing without visible red emergency stop button
e-stop button covered or obstructed by signage or equipment
emergency stop at escalator with no identifying label or marking

description: Escalator skirt deflector missing or damaged — skirt brushes or deflector devices absent from escalator skirt panels creating side entrapment risk
visual_signals: escalator skirt panel without deflector brush strip installed
missing or torn skirt brush allowing gap between step and skirt
damaged skirt deflector device with bristles worn or removed

description: Escalator handrail inlet guard missing — no guard device at handrail entry point into balustrade creating finger entrapment hazard
visual_signals: escalator handrail entering balustrade without protective guard
gap at handrail inlet point where fingers could be pulled in
missing plastic or metal guard at handrail disappearing point

description: Dumbwaiter door interlock bypass — dumbwaiter hoistway door able to open when car is not at landing or interlock device visibly defeated
visual_signals: dumbwaiter door standing open with no car visible at landing
interlock mechanism on dumbwaiter door taped or wired in defeated position
dumbwaiter shaft visible through open door with car at different level

description: Dumbwaiter capacity label missing — dumbwaiter car or landing lacking posted rated load capacity sign
visual_signals: dumbwaiter opening without capacity label on wall or frame
dumbwaiter car interior lacking weight limit placard
faded or missing load rating sign at dumbwaiter landing

description: Platform lift gate interlock failure — wheelchair or platform lift gate opening without car at landing level or gate not locking when lift moves
visual_signals: platform lift gate standing open with lift platform at different level
wheelchair lift gate without visible interlock hardware installed
platform lift operating with gate in unlatched position

description: Platform lift missing emergency lowering — wheelchair or platform lift without manual emergency lowering valve or instructions posted
visual_signals: platform lift without emergency lowering instructions posted
wheelchair lift lacking visible manual lowering valve or handle
platform lift with no emergency operation panel or signage

description: Platform lift capacity sign missing — wheelchair or platform lift without posted rated load capacity visible to users
visual_signals: platform lift car without weight capacity placard visible
wheelchair lift entrance lacking posted load rating sign
capacity label on platform lift faded beyond readability

description: Hydraulic elevator jack casing deterioration — visible corrosion, damage, or ground settlement around hydraulic jack casing at pit level
visual_signals: corrosion staining on jack casing pipe at pit floor level
visible settlement or shifting around hydraulic cylinder base
oil seepage at jack casing seal where casing enters ground

description: Hydraulic elevator oil overheating — hydraulic power unit with discolored or darkened oil visible in sight glass or reservoir
visual_signals: sight glass on hydraulic tank showing dark or blackened oil
hydraulic reservoir with burnt smell and discolored fluid visible
oil temperature gauge reading in red or elevated zone

description: Traction elevator governor rope worn or damaged — governor rope showing fraying, broken strands, or excessive wear
visual_signals: broken wire strands visible on governor rope at sheave
frayed governor rope with fuzzy appearance from broken wires
governor rope with visible flat spots from sheave wear

description: Traction elevator compensating chain or rope damaged — compensation system showing broken links, excessive wear, or misalignment
visual_signals: compensating chain with visibly worn or elongated links
compensation rope with broken strands at sheave contact
compensating chain hitting or rubbing against hoistway structure

description: Deflector sheave guard missing — sheave or pulley in hoistway or machine room without protective guard to prevent rope jumping
visual_signals: overhead sheave without guard plate over rope groove
deflector pulley in machine room with no rope retainer installed
sheave in hoistway top with exposed rope path and no guard

description: Outdated relay-logic controller — elevator controller using obsolete relay logic or drum-type selector indicating need for modernization
visual_signals: controller cabinet filled with electromechanical relays and contactors
drum-type floor selector visible in machine room
relay-based controller with multiple open-frame relays on panel

description: Obsolete door operator — mechanical door operator with exposed linkages indicating pre-modern design requiring upgrade
visual_signals: door operator with visible mechanical arms and linkage mechanism
exposed chain or belt drive door operator on car top
old-style door closer with heavy spring mechanism visible

description: Seismic counterweight guard missing — counterweight frame without seismic restraint bracket or derailment guard in seismic zones
visual_signals: counterweight frame in hoistway without seismic bracket visible
counterweight running along rails with no derailment guard
counterweight frame without retainer clip at rail engagement

description: Rail bracket condition deteriorated — guide rail brackets showing loose bolts, corrosion, or cracking at hoistway wall connection
visual_signals: guide rail bracket with visibly loose or missing anchor bolts
corroded rail bracket at hoistway wall attachment point
cracked weld on rail bracket connecting rail to wall mount

description: Seismic switch missing or not installed — elevator in seismic zone without required seismic trigger switch for automatic shutdown
visual_signals: machine room lacking visible seismic sensor or switch device
no seismic trigger unit mounted in machine room or pit
controller panel without seismic relay or activation module

description: Vandalism or intentional damage — graffiti on cab walls, scratched or burned buttons, broken indicators, or torn handrail covers
visual_signals: spray paint graffiti or marker tagging on cab wall panels
cigarette burn marks or scratched etching on cab surfaces
buttons melted or burned with intentional damage marks

description: Cab floor indicator or display vandalized — in-cab floor position display scratched, smashed, or deliberately damaged
visual_signals: smashed or cracked floor indicator display screen in cab
position display with scratched-over segments making it unreadable
floor indicator pulled away from wall with wiring exposed

description: Phase II firefighter key switch not present or not properly marked — firefighter service key switch missing required labeling or cover on COP
visual_signals: car operating panel without firefighter service key switch visible
key switch on COP without Phase II firefighter identification label
firefighter key switch cover missing or damaged on car panel

description: Phase I firefighter recall switch missing at designated landing — lobby or designated level lacking Phase I fire recall key switch
visual_signals: main lobby landing without fire recall key switch panel
designated recall floor lacking Phase I firefighter switch
fire recall switch panel with missing key cylinder or cover

description: Braille and raised character plates missing or illegible — ADA-required tactile floor markings and Braille absent or worn smooth on car operating panel and jamb plates
visual_signals: car operating panel buttons without Braille markings beside them
floor number jamb plate at landing lacking raised characters
Braille dots worn smooth and no longer raised on button plate

description: Audible floor indicator not functioning — elevator not providing audible floor announcement or signal for visually impaired passengers per ADA
visual_signals: cab arriving at floor with no audible chime or announcement
hall lantern illuminating without accompanying audible signal
car operating panel lacking audible feedback when buttons pressed

description: Door dwell time insufficient — elevator doors closing too quickly after opening, not meeting ADA minimum hold-open time requirements
visual_signals: doors beginning to close immediately after fully opening
passenger rushing to enter as doors close rapidly after opening
doors closing on slow-moving person before they complete entry

description: Inspection certificate expired — posted inspection certificate showing a date that has passed, indicating overdue re-inspection
visual_signals: inspection certificate with clearly expired date visible in frame
certificate showing last inspection more than one year ago
out-of-date compliance sticker or certificate in cab display

description: Escalator floor plate damaged or loose — escalator upper or lower floor plate loose, rocking, or damaged creating trip hazard
visual_signals: escalator floor plate rocking when stepped on at landing
loose or displaced floor plate at escalator exit point
damaged edge of escalator floor plate creating lip or gap

description: Escalator balustrade panel cracked or missing — interior glass or metal balustrade panel on escalator cracked, shattered, or absent
visual_signals: cracked glass balustrade panel on escalator interior side
missing balustrade panel section exposing escalator truss interior
shattered glass panel with spider-web fracture on escalator side
